sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111806" key="flogmotu/rannos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλογμοτύραννος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111806.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruling the fire,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαμπηδών</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
